reviews.review_title: GREAT That Easy VR Building continued!
reviews.review_description: Thanks for "picking up the Blocks" and continuing a great VR app! Hoped someone would. - It starts simple, but you can build really complicated things with this if you have a little patience.

Before I downloaded this I thought "Ok, it is a free game so I better not expect too much." But after playing some more I realized how amazing it truly was. Even so I have some ideas to make it even better: 
I love the palette-thing going on with the paint options, but, however, I would like some more options. Maybe you could chose your own RGB colors to put on you r palette.
Also I would love it if you could change the size of the grid, which would make it easier to align things. 

All in all, it's a great game.

reviews.review_title: Visual bug not a minute in.
reviews.review_description: I was building something when the pipe draw. brush became this hot pink mess. I had to close one eye while using it because it was different on each lens. This game works well and is easy to understand, but this bug made it too annoying to play.

developer_response.body: Hi. Is this still happening? Can you switch to the beta and see if it happens there as well?

reviews.review_description: So basically it says take off your headset to sign in but I dont know what it means by that but In general the games really good it's really fun making goofy characters for no reason also is there a feature where you can download the models and put them on pc or phone?

Icosa has done an amazing job with this app, I have been following this since the Steam beta was released, and I am amazed that the functionality is virtually the same directly on the Quest! Models and scenes can be stored locally on your device and then offloaded by connecting to a Mac or PC, so you can use another modeler like Blender after you've started in this app. Keep up the great work!
Great app can't wait to be able to import things to open brush. Great work devs!!!

developer_response.body: You already can if you copy the files yourself. But it's about to get a *lot* easier. :)

reviews.review_description:
It is so fun to use! Makes creating awesome models feel like a fun game rather than a chore.
I've been waiting for this. Fell in love when I've seen it is now continued by Icosa! Absolutely love it. And love all the people behind it!
